name: ArviZ (Bayesian Visualization)

performance.notes: Visualization and statistics on MCMC samples; speed depends on chain size

agent_readiness.notes: Exploratory analysis of Bayesian models. Visualizes MCMC posterior samples from PyMC, Stan (cmdstanpy), NumPyro, and other Bayesian frameworks. Trace plots, pair plots, posterior predictive checks, ROPE analysis, LOO/WAIC model comparison, energy plots, rank plots. InferenceData object as universal container. Matplotlib and Bokeh backends. The standard visualization library for Bayesian analysis in Python.

gotchas: Requires Bayesian model results (MCMC samples) to be useful
Some plots slow for large chains
best_when: Visualizing and diagnosing MCMC posterior samples
Any PyMC, Stan, or NumPyro modeling workflow
summary: ArviZ is the standard visualization library for Bayesian analysis in Python. Visualizes MCMC posteriors from PyMC, Stan, NumPyro, and other frameworks. Trace plots, posterior predictive checks, LOO/WAIC model comparison, pair plots. Universal InferenceData container. Essential companion to any PyMC or Stan workflow for understanding model results.
